query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A very dark image showing faint, barely discernible warm orange-brown tonal areas against a predominantly black background. Slight vertical streaks of muted amber light appear in the upper right and lower center, with soft diffuse edges. No distinct subjects, objects, or identifiable forms are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A suffocatingly dark image with near-total blackness, where faint sickly amber-brown glows barely penetrate the oppressive shadow. Heavy grain and complete absence of detail render the scene into murky abstraction, with muted warm tones smeared into vertical streaks that suggest decay or distant dread rather than any identifiable subject. The crushing low contrast and extreme underexposure create an atmosphere of claustrophobic unease and melancholic emptiness.
